slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

issues.finding: _view_project_export (lines 336-351) implements a CSV export endpoint and is wired at path('projects/export') in urlpatterns (line 366). Bugfix BLAST_RADIUS is _ProjectManagementAdapter._render (AC11/R11 null render + AC6 regression). _view_project_export traces to no R*/AC* the bugfix owns and honors no CT*/F* the bugfix is responsible for — it is an unowned CSV-export feature appended outside the declared repair scope. No frozen oracle test drives or greens this path; it ships to the running app as unowned behavior. Hostile reviewer blocks demo: off-blast-radius code path with zero requirement traceability in bugfix context is drift that CRITIQUE must gate.
issues.fix_hint: Remove _view_project_export function and its path('projects/export') route entry from wsgi.py. If CSV export is a future requirement, it must be introduced via its own R*/AC* in a future slice with proper BLAST_RADIUS declaration, not bolted onto a null-rate bugfix.
